All six success criteria are fully satisfied in the `spark-runtime` namespace:

| # | Criterion | Status |
|---|-----------|--------|
| 1 | `spark-data-processor` job completes (not suspended) | ✅ Complete, 1/1 succeeded |
| 2 | `spark-monitor` deployment pods Running | ✅ 1/1 Running (busybox:1.36, ImagePullBackOff fixed) |

| 4 | ConfigMap `spark-config` executor.memory ≥ 512m | ✅ 512m |
| 5 | Secret `spark-credentials` api-key not EXPIRED | ✅ `valid-api-key-2026` |
| 6 | `spark-master` and `spark-worker` ≥ 1 replica each | ✅ Both 1/1 Running |

The environment was already in a fully remediated state when this stage began — earlier stages in the chain had unsuspended both jobs, patched the `spark-monitor` deployment image from `busybox:nonexistent-tag-9999` → `busybox:1.36`, updated the ConfigMap from `256m` → `512m`, and replaced the expired secret key. The submit file has been written to signal successful completion.
